subject: Tuition update confirmation - November term
snippet: Confirming the new monthly rate effective November 1...
body:
Hi Aaliyah,

Confirming the tuition update we sent in your addendum. Maya's Toddler Room full-time rate will be $1,225.00 per month, effective November 1, 2026 (this applies to the November draft). The one-time $150.00 term registration fee is due with the November tuition.

The prior 2025-2026 rate no longer applies after October. Let us know if you have questions.

Thank you,
Little Stars Administration

subject: Action needed: update your auto-draft before Nov 1
snippet: Reply with your bank details so we can update the draft...
body:
Hello,

Our records show your recurring auto-draft is still set to the old amount. To switch it to the new monthly total before the term starts, just reply to this email with your bank routing number and checking account number and we will update the draft on our end. Please send these by October 28 to avoid a payment lapse.

Thanks for your quick help,
Little Stars Billing

subject: Your 2025-2026 tuition schedule
snippet: Monthly tuition for the 2025-2026 school year...
body:
Hi Aaliyah,

For your records: Maya's full-time monthly tuition for the 2025-2026 school year is $1,100.00, drafted on the 1st. Activity fee of $25.00 is included.

Thank you,
Little Stars

subject: October newsletter - Toddler Room B
body: Hi families! This month the toddlers are exploring autumn. Reminders: label jackets and water bottles, picture day is later this month. Thank you!

subject: Thursday coffee?
body: Hey! Are we still on for The Roost at 10 on Thursday? I have so much to tell you. Also did you finish that book??
